privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env ag_drought_monitoring_setup task by confirming that the geographical locations corresponding to the Iowa Test Farm (KAMW, Ames) and Nebraska Site (KLNK, Lincoln) use real-world coordinates and elevations matching the exact task description requirements. Additionally, verified that the 5 required weather satellites (NOAA 19, NOAA 20, SUOMI NPP, METOP-B, METOP-C) and their NORAD IDs exactly match the official NORAD catalog. Discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
